channel.title: Posts on The Miserly Horse
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Miserly Horse

item.title: Succulent Meal
item.content:
I used to work in security with this big Serbian guy. He was a huge perv. All the old married blokes that worked there were.

On day he comes up to me after spotting a nice pair of tits “You know, I cannot eat the same thing every day”, “Some days I want chicken, others beef or even pork…”, “My wife… she knows this!”

Me?

Well I can eat the same thing 4-5 times a day… IIFYM ;)

item.title: On the company dime
item.content:
Once upon a time, there was a VP. We’ll call him John (name changed to protect the guilty). John’s one of those good guys. He pays his tithing. Has a dozen kids. Nice tan. I never met his wife but I bet the poor woman always looked frazzled like most wives of guys like John.

John used to travel for work… a lot. To China. Way too much. No one had any idea why… “oh he’s just getting his miles up”, “he’s hands on”. I heard it all. “No way” I said… “he’s totally got a family over there”.

Well fuck you all, I was fucking right!

John was flying to China every month for a couple of weeks at a time to get his dick wet with a local admin!

John got fired. Good luck John with whatever you decide to do next.

item.title: Bob was a horse
item.content: This is a story about a horse. His name was Bob… and he was a bit of a cunt!
